channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: CPRG and AI4India release study on how artificial intelligence is reshaping future job opportunities in India
item.description: The Centre of Policy Research and Governance (CPRG) along with AI4India has released a detailed report titled 'Future of Jobs in the Age of AI: Emerging Roles, New Opportunities', focusing on how arti...

item.title: Manchester United Captain Bruno Fernandes Named Premier League Player of the Season
item.description: Manchester United captain Bruno Fernandes has officially been named the Premier League Player of the Season for the 2025-26 campaign after delivering outstanding performances throughout the year. The ...

item.title: Why Filipino graduates are seeking opportunities abroad despite being trained for leadership
item.description: The article discusses the growing concern over the increasing number of Filipino students and graduates who choose to pursue opportunities abroad, despite being educated and trained locally to become ...

item.title: Internal Republican Party divisions intensify amid disputes over spending bills and Trump influence
item.description: This opinion article argues that the Republican Party is experiencing significant internal turmoil driven by conflicts over major spending decisions, policy priorities, and the continued influence of ...

item.title: France imposes entry ban on Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir after Gaza flotilla controversy
item.description: France has announced a ban on Israeli National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir from entering French territory following widespread criticism over a video showing detained Gaza flotilla activists bei...

item.title: Researchers Explore Quantum Jamming as a Way to Probe the Limits of Causality and Secure Communication
item.description: The article explores a developing area of quantum physics and cryptography centered on a theoretical concept known as quantum jamming. Researchers working in quantum information science are re-examini...

item.title: Philippine Defense Secretary rules out peace talks with communist rebels amid Toboso 19 controversy
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. has stated that the Philippine government is no longer open to peace talks with members of the New People’s Army (NPA), even in the aftermath of the controversia...

item.title: Ruvuma coal expands export markets across Africa and Asia amid rising production
item.description: Ruvuma Region in southern Tanzania is experiencing strong growth in its coal mining sector, becoming an important supplier in both African and international markets. Production has exceeded 3.6 millio...

item.title: Pakistan reports diplomatic progress in Iran talks during Field Marshal Asim Munir’s Tehran visit
item.description: According to the Inter-Services Public Relations (ISPR), Chief of Defence Forces and Chief of the Army Staff Field Marshal Asim Munir held intensive discussions with Iran’s senior leadership during hi...

item.title: France bars Israeli minister Itamar Ben-Gvir over treatment of Gaza flotilla detainees
item.description: France has announced a ban on Israeli far-right National Security Minister Itamar Ben-Gvir from entering its territory, following what French officials described as his unacceptable conduct and remark...

item.title: Officials Struggle to Stabilize Dangerous MMA Chemical Tank in Garden Grove
item.description: Authorities in Orange County, California, spent Friday attempting to stabilize a large pressurized tank containing approximately 7,000 gallons of methyl methacrylate (MMA), a toxic and highly flammabl...

item.title: Moncton cancer survivor travels across Canada by hitchhiking, sharing a story of resilience and kindness
item.description: A cancer survivor from Moncton, New Brunswick, is undertaking a remarkable journey across Canada by hitchhiking, using the experience as both a personal milestone and a way to reflect on recovery and ...

item.title: Trans Niger Pipeline reports zero infractions amid improved oil security as Nigeria nears OPEC production target
item.description: The Pipeline Infrastructure Nigeria Limited (PINL) has reported that the Trans Niger Pipeline recorded zero infractions in the past month, indicating a strong improvement in pipeline security and redu...

item.title: Jessica Hull falls after collision in women’s 1500m final at Australian athletics championships
item.description: Jessica Hull was involved in a dramatic incident during the women’s 1500 metres final at the Australian athletics championships, where she fell heavily in the closing stages of a tightly contested spr...

item.title: GKN Aerospace facility linked to Orange County chemical tank emergency in Garden Grove
item.description: A chemical emergency in Garden Grove, Orange County, has drawn attention to GKN Aerospace, a UK-based aerospace manufacturer operating a large facility on Western Avenue. The incident centers on a tan...

item.title: DCI arrests terror suspect in Garissa, recovers suspected explosive device during police operation
item.description: Police officers in Garissa County successfully arrested a suspected terror suspect following a dramatic chase on Saturday, May 23. The suspect, identified as Hussein Issa Baraki, was first noticed by ...

item.title: Orlando Pirates end 14-year league drought with victory over Orbit College
item.description: Orlando Pirates secured their first league title in 14 years after beating Orbit College 2-0 at Mbombela Stadium in a dramatic final-day clash. The victory ended Mamelodi Sundowns’ run of eight consec...

item.title: Factory Operations Suspended Following Death of Owner Amid Business Continuity Concerns
item.description: Kifo cha ghafla cha mmiliki wa kiwanda kimesababisha kusimama kwa shughuli za uzalishaji pamoja na nafasi za ajira katika eneo husika, jambo lililoleta wasiwasi mkubwa kwa wafanyakazi na jamii inayote...

item.title: Competitive Three-Way Race Shapes Los Angeles City Attorney Election Amid Controversy and Legal Challenges
item.description: The Los Angeles city attorney race has become unexpectedly competitive, marked by controversy, shifting alliances, and high financial stakes. Incumbent Hydee Feldstein Soto is seeking reelection while...

item.title: SpaceX Starship V3 completes first test flight with controlled splashdown after explosive re-entry
item.description: SpaceX’s Starship V3 has completed its debut uncrewed test flight, ending in a dramatic but planned fiery descent and splashdown in the Indian Ocean. The towering rocket lifted off on Friday evening f...
